compressed_view: Token compliance audit: check order is color literals (#1 fail rate), raw spacing values (#2), raw font declarations (#3). DS evolution rate: v2.0 added 0 tokens, v4.0+ added 2-4 per refactor (e.g. AppSize.tabBarClearance, AppText.monoCaption). Propose new tokens only when same raw value repeats 2+ times across screens. Track compound component reuse: ProgressBar from Nutrition available for Stats, AppLayout from Stats available for Settings. Always search AppComponents.swift before extracting new components. Anti-patterns: over-tokenizing one-off micro-adjustments (Settings v2 correctly added 0 new tokens), forgetting pbxproj update in same commit as v2 file. Load L2 design-system-decisions.json for token inventory, grep for raw Color/hex/hardcoded padding.

task_signature.context: Check a SwiftUI file for raw color/spacing/font literals and propose semantic token replacements.

learned_patterns.decision: Color literals fail most often (#1), followed by raw spacing values (#2), then raw font declarations (#3). Always check in this order to front-load the highest-yield fixes.

v2.0 added 0 net new tokens. v4.0+ added 2-4 tokens per refactor (e.g. AppSize.tabBarClearance, AppText.monoCaption in Training v2). Propose a new token only when the same raw value pattern repeats 2+ times across screens.

ProgressBar component from Nutrition is available for Stats. AppLayout component from Stats is available for Settings. Always search existing components in AppComponents.swift before extracting a new one.

anti_patterns.what_went_wrong: One-off micro-adjustments (e.g. a single pixel nudge in one view) do not need a semantic token. Only tokenize patterns that appear in 2+ places across screens. Settings v2 correctly added 0 new tokens.
Onboarding v2 required 3 follow-up fix commits because the pbxproj was not updated in the same commit as the v2 file. Always update project.pbxproj in the same commit that introduces the v2 file.

speedup_instructions: Load L2 design-system-decisions.json for token inventory. Grep for Color.white, .black, hex values, hardcoded padding. Fix with existing tokens first.
